case_title: DIANA HALTERMAN VS. PEOPLES MORTGAGE INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT PEOPLES MORTGAGE INC.
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT PEOPLES MORTGAGE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF DIANA HALTERMAN APPEARED. DEFENDANT PEOPLES MORTGAGE INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY LINDA K. WHITE THROUGH COURTCALL. DEFENDANT STIPULATES TO MATTER HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT PEOPLES MORTGAGE INC.

ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER: THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING DECISION:[X] YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD. A HEARING ON THIS REQUEST IS SCHEDULED AS FOLLOWS: JULY 11, 2017 @3:30 P.M. IN DEPARTMENT 506.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALTERMAN, DIANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PEOPLES MORTGAGE INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY HALTERMAN, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT PEOPLES MORTGAGE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALTERMAN, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT PEOPLES MORTGAGE INC.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HALTERMAN, DIANA
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: COPY SC-105A ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 06/26/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURN NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SENT TO DEFENDANT UNABLE TO FORWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-23-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEOPLES MORTGAGE INC.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALTERMAN, DIANA
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
